data.title: Implement stop hook to auto-capture friction suggestions from tool logs
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Context
Implement story d6b4-3217: stop hook that scans tool logs and records mechanical-friction suggestions.

Read the full story context: .claude/scripts/dso ticket show d6b4-3217

## Summary
Add a stop hook function to plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/stop.sh that scans tool-error-counter.json and tool-use-*.jsonl at session end. Record a suggestion via suggestion-record.sh when configurable thresholds are exceeded (suggestion.error_threshold and suggestion.timeout_threshold in dso-config.conf). Must handle missing files gracefully and comply with stop.sh fail-open contract (timeout wrapper).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Hook scans tool logs and calls suggestion-record.sh when thresholds exceeded
- [ ] Handles missing tool-error-counter.json gracefully (no crash)
- [ ] suggestion.error_threshold and suggestion.timeout_threshold keys in .claude/dso-config.conf
  Verify: grep -q 'suggestion.error_threshold' .claude/dso-config.conf
- [ ] Operates within stop.sh fail-open contract (timeout wrapper)
